social.notWired: Shiga ta social ba a haɗa ba tukuna — yi amfani da imel a yanzu.

aside.testimonialQuote: Na yi booking da safe 8, na yi magana da Dr. Adeyemi da karfe 9, magani a farmaci na da rana. Haka ne kulawa ya kamata.

hero.subtitle: Fara tafiyar warkarwa tare da MRD Online Clinic.
hero.figcaption: Likita mai murmushi tare da bayanan alƙawari — yi booking da masu aiki da aka tabbatar a kowane lokaci.
hero.doctorAlt: Likitan mata Musulma ta Najeriya cikin farar riga da hijabin likita.
hero.faqDoctorAlt: Likitan Najeriya cikin farar riga yana duba bayanai.
hero.howItWorksAlt: Likita a asibiti na zamani yana amfani da kwamfuta.

patients.register: Yi rajista a matsayin marar lafiya

howItWorks.intro: Daga bincike zuwa magunguna, kowane mataki yana kan dandali don ɗan lokaci da bayanai masu kyau.

search.title: Bincika Likita
search.description: Nemo masu aiki da aka tabbatar ta fanni, wuri, ko samuwa.

profile.title: Duba Bayanan Likita
profile.description: Bincika bayanan cikakke, harsuna, da ra'ayin marasa lafiya kafin booking.

book.title: Yi Booking & Tattaunawa Kan Layi
book.description: Yi booking lokaci da ya dace, sannan haɗu da likitan ku ta saƙo ko bidiyo.

pharmacy.title: Magunguna
pharmacy.description: Idan an bayar da magani, likitan ku yana tura zuwa farmacin abokin ciniki.

faq.heading: Tambayoyin da Ake Yawan Yi
faq.q1: Yaya Zan Yi Booking Alƙawari Da Likita?
faq.a1: Ee, ziyarci gidan mu kuma shiga ko ƙirƙiri asusu. Bincika likita ta fanni, wuri, ko samuwa & tabbatar da booking.
faq.q2: Zan Iya Neman Likita Musamman Lokacin Booking?
faq.a2: Ee. Kowane booking yana da alaƙa da bayanan martaban mai aikin da kuka zaɓa.
faq.q3: Me Zan Yi Idan Ina Buƙatar Soke Ko Canja Alƙawari?
faq.a3: Buɗe Alƙawura daga allon marar lafiya da wuri, sannan yi soke ko canza.
faq.q4: Me Idan Na Jinkirta Zuwa Alƙawari?
faq.a4: Aika saƙo ga likitan ku ta hanyar tattaunawa mai tsaro.
faq.q5: Zan Iya Yi Booking Ga 'Yan Uwa Ko Masu Dogaro?
faq.a5: Inda asusun ku ya ba da damar masu dogaro, za ku iya yi booking a madadin su.

testimonials.heading: Abin da Marasa Lafiya Suke Faɗi
testimonials.subtitle: Gogewar gaske daga marasa lafiya a Najeriya.

t1.quote: MRD Online Clinic ya sauƙaƙe nemo ƙwararru. Na yi booking, tattaunawa, da karɓar magani — a rana ɗaya.
t1.name: Aisha Ahmad

t2.quote: A matsayin ƙwararru mai aiki, tattaunawa da likita ba tare da barin ofis ba — canji mai girma.
t2.name: Fatima Yusuf

t3.quote: Likitan da aka haɗe ni da shi ya kasance mai zurfi da sana'a. Na ji cikin aminci.
t3.name: Kwame Mensah

patients.heading: Marasa lafiya

credentials.title: Takardun shaida — MRD Online Clinic
credentials.heading: Takardun shaida
credentials.description: Ƙaddamar da lambar lasisin likita da takardar ku domin masu gudanarwa su tabbatar da aikinku. Marasa lafiya suna ganin ku a jerin likitoci bayan an amince.
credentials.statusVerified: An amince da takardun ku. Kuna bayyana a Nemo likita idan an kunna yin booking.
credentials.statusReview: Ƙungiyarmu tana nazarin ƙaddamarwar ku — yawanci cikin sa'o'i 24.
credentials.statusRejected: Da fatan za a sabunta bayanan lasisin ku kuma a sake ƙaddamarwa.
credentials.statusPending: Loda takardar lasisin ku don fara tabbatarwa.
credentials.uploadHint: PDF ko hoto (JPG, PNG), mafi girma 10MB. Sabunta fayil yana sake ƙaddamarwa don nazari.
credentials.submitted: An ƙaddamar da takardar lasisi don nazari
credentials.accountNote: Bayanan sirri da hoton martabar ku suna cikin

availability.title: Lokacin samuwa — MRD Online Clinic
availability.heading: Lokacin samuwa
availability.description: Ƙayyade lokutan da kuke samuwa don sabbin booking. Buɗaɗɗen lokuta suna daidaita da bayanan ku na jama'a bayan an tabbatar da ku; marasa lafiya suna zaɓa daga waɗannan lokuta lokacin yin jadawali.

prescriptions.description: Magungunan da kuka bayar daga alƙawurorin da aka kammala. Bayar da sabo daga shafin cikakken alƙawari.

prescriptions.emptyHint: Kammala ziyara kuma bayar da magani daga shafin cikakken alƙawari.

dialog.title: Samuwar lokutan ziyara
dialog.description: Ƙara lokaci da za a iya booking don marasa lafiya. Buɗaɗɗun lokuta suna bayyana a bayanan martaba na jama'a bayan an tabbatar da ku. Cire lokaci a kowane lokaci idan har yanzu buɗe ne kuma ba a yi booking ba.
